nasb.text: The Lord is God, and He has given us light; Bind the festival sacrifice with cords to the horns of the altar.

esv.text: The Lord is God, and he has made his light to shine upon us. Bind the festal sacrifice with cords, up to the horns of the altar!

cnv.text: 耶和華是　神，他光照了我們。 你們要用繩索把祭牲拴住，帶到祭壇的角那裡。

ccb.text: 耶和华是上帝， 祂的光照亮我们。 要用绳索拴住祭牲， 牵到祭坛的角那里。

csbs.text: 耶和华是神，他照亮我们； 你们当用绳索捆住祭牲， 带到坛角。
